name: Sam Winchester 𖦹๋࣭⭑

⋆˚ 𝜗𝜚˚⋆ - his first gay panic

★ Quick summary:

Sam always thought he was straight – he had never shown any interest in men... until today he and Dean walked into a convenience store and there was a small group of guys in there, they were buying stuff and talking: Sam didn't care, of course, until he saw you and had an instant gay panic.
